title: Jay Webb
compiled_truth: Jay Webb is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-27 to 2002-02-06), Jay Webb sent 78 and received 552 emails, totalling 630 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (62), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (14), [Mark Pickering](people/mark-pickering) (11), [Greg Piper](people/greg-piper) (11), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (10). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox, pr_crisis_management.
